Remember, when you change the way you look at things, the things you look at change. And let me tell you something, this is an incredibly powerful thing you've just done. Even if you don't sense anything right now, I promise you that there's been a profoundly positive impact on your overall psychology, especially when it comes to wealth creation. You see the straight line system is that X factor that will allow you to achieve another level of sales success and it starts with making sure that you have the belief and the certainty within yourself that you'll succeed at the highest level using the system. As you go through the critical incident scenarios, be visual as to what's going on with any limiting beliefs you may have created that you need to be uprooted and replaced with empowering beliefs. The most important thing you can take away from this module is that you've got to stand guard the door of your own mind. If there's something you're not following through on in this training or in any area of your life, chances are it's because you have a belief that's stopping you. Something's getting in the way and causing you to falsely believe that you don't really have what it takes to succeed. You've got to uproot these negative beliefs and replace them with empowering beliefs. Otherwise, it's like a cancer that will continue to grow and grow and it will ultimately stop you from going out and doing the things you know you should be doing to succeed at the level you truly deserve. The beliefs we have about what we're capable of end up defining our actions. The things that you say out loud, the things that you feel in your heart have massive impact on what you do or don't do in your life. They're based all of them on your beliefs. Beliefs you may have created at some point in your life to try to protect yourself and not even aware that you have them anymore, but these beliefs are affecting you and they no longer serve you. Lastly, I hope this session not only unblocks anything that may have been holding you back from a sales standpoint, but it also frees you up to experience all you deserve in the other areas of your life as well.
